title: Leo the Brave Lion
idea: A lion who is scared of the dark learns to be brave with help from a tiny firefly.
preview: Deep in the Sunflower Savanna lived a fluffy lion named Leo. He had a big mane, loud roar — but one tiny secret: he was afraid of the dark! Every night when the sun dipped below the hills, Leo would hide under his favourite baobab tree, shaking his whiskers...

title: Zara and the Space Cookies
idea: A little girl flies her cookie-powered rocket to the moon to share cookies with aliens.
preview: WHOOOOSH! Zara's rocket blasted through fluffy white clouds, past twinkling stars, and straight toward the big round moon. Her special rocket ran on the best fuel in the universe — Grandma's chocolate chip cookies! "More fuel!" she giggled, munching one...

title: The Tiny Wizard's First Spell
idea: The youngest wizard at magic school accidentally turns the whole school into a giant cake.
preview: Pip was the shortest, newest, and most nervous student at Stardust Academy. His robes were too big, his wand was crooked, and he had never gotten a spell right on the first try. On the morning of the Grand Spell Exam, something went very, very wrong...

title: Bubbles Makes a Friend
idea: A lonely dolphin who can't swim fast makes friends with a slow-moving sea turtle.
preview: In the sparkling blue Coral Bay lived a little dolphin named Bubbles. All the other dolphins were fast — zip zip zip through the waves! But Bubbles loved to go slow, noticing beautiful shells and funny crabs along the sandy bottom...

title: The Missing Homework Mystery
idea: A clever girl detective solves the mystery of who ate her homework — turns out it was her own backpack.
preview: "The homework is GONE!" Maya stared at her empty folder in shock. She had finished it last night — three whole pages about volcanoes! She pulled out her detective notebook and wrote in big letters: CASE #1: THE VANISHING VOLCANO HOMEWORK...

title: Two Colours, One Rainbow
idea: A red crayon and a blue crayon argue about which colour is better until they make purple together.
preview: Red Crayon was absolutely certain she was the most important colour in the whole crayon box. "Every firetruck, every apple, every ladybug — all ME!" Blue Crayon huffed. "But what about the sky? The ocean? The blueberries?"...
